synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-0491 Moderate: Oracle Linux 9 postgresql security update
description:
[13.23-1]
- Update to 13.23
- Resolves: RHEL-128812 (CVE-2025-12818)

[13.22-3]
- Add sysusers configuration and complete tmpfiles.d dynamically
- Related: RHEL-94905

[13.22-2]
- Define tmpfiles.d to enable ostree and bootc support
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-0491

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-0491.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
postgresql-13.23-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
postgresql-contrib-13.23-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
postgresql-docs-13.23-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
postgresql-plperl-13.23-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
postgresql-plpython3-13.23-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
postgresql-pltcl-13.23-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
postgresql-private-devel-13.23-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
postgresql-private-libs-13.23-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
postgresql-server-13.23-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
postgresql-server-devel-13.23-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
postgresql-static-13.23-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
postgresql-test-13.23-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
postgresql-test-rpm-macros-13.23-1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
postgresql-upgrade-13.23-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
postgresql-upgrade-devel-13.23-1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
postgresql-13.23-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
postgresql-contrib-13.23-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
postgresql-docs-13.23-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
postgresql-plperl-13.23-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
postgresql-plpython3-13.23-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
postgresql-pltcl-13.23-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
postgresql-private-devel-13.23-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
postgresql-private-libs-13.23-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
postgresql-server-13.23-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
postgresql-server-devel-13.23-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
postgresql-static-13.23-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
postgresql-test-13.23-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
postgresql-test-rpm-macros-13.23-1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
postgresql-upgrade-13.23-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
postgresql-upgrade-devel-13.23-1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/postgresql-13.23-1.el9_7.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-12817
CVE-2025-12818




Description of changes:

[13.23-1]
- Update to 13.23
- Resolves: RHEL-128812 (CVE-2025-12818)

[13.22-3]
- Add sysusers configuration and complete tmpfiles.d dynamically
- Related: RHEL-94905

[13.22-2]
- Define tmpfiles.d to enable ostree and bootc support
